content:
[S1]: Inside every living thing, there are tiny tiny things called cells that are like tiny factories.
[READER]: I'm a little curious about what these tiny factories do, and I'm wondering what makes them work, I hope the next sentence tells me more about that.

[S2]: These cells need instructions to know what to do, like a recipe to make a cake, and that's where something called mRNA comes in.
[READER]: Hmm, I like recipes, and I'm starting to think that mRNA might be like a special set of instructions, I'm curious to know more about what mRNA is and how it works.

[S3]: mRNA is like a special messenger that carries the instructions from one part of the cell to another part, telling it what to do.
[READER]: That sounds like a pretty cool job, I'm imagining a tiny little messenger running around inside the cell, I want to know more about how it gets these instructions and where it takes them.

[S4]: The instructions that mRNA carries are like a secret code, and the cell has a special way of reading that code to know what to do.
[READER]: A secret code sounds like a mystery, I'm intrigued and I want to know more about this code and how the cell figures it out, maybe the next sentence can explain that.

[S5]: The code is made up of special letters, called nucleotides, that are like a special alphabet, and the cell uses them to make proteins, which are like the building blocks of our bodies.
[READER]: Whoa, that's a lot of new words, I'm feeling a bit confused, but I'm also excited to learn about these new things, I hope the next sentence can explain it in a simpler way.

[S6]: Think of it like building with Legos, the mRNA is like the instructions that tell you which blocks to use and how to put them together to make a cool castle.
[READER]: Oh, I love Legos, that makes sense, I can imagine the mRNA telling the cell which blocks to use, now I'm curious to know what happens after the castle is built.

[S7]: When the cell follows the instructions carried by the mRNA, it can make all sorts of important things, like the proteins that make our muscles strong or our skin healthy.
[READER]: That's so cool, I'm starting to understand how important mRNA is, I'm feeling proud of myself for learning something new, I hope the next sentence can tell me more about why this is important.

[S8]: So, mRNA is like a tiny little messenger that helps our cells work properly, and without it, our bodies wouldn't be able to function.
[READER]: Wow, that's a big deal, I'm feeling a bit amazed by how important mRNA is, I think I'm starting to get it, but I might need one more sentence to summarize it all.

[S9]: To sum it up, mRNA is like a special set of instructions that helps our cells make the things they need to keep our bodies healthy and strong.
[READER]: Yeah, I think I get it now, mRNA is like a special helper that makes sure our cells do their job, I'm feeling happy and proud of myself for learning something new, I think that's a good place to stop.
